name: AskUserQuestion MCP Rewrite
slug: Rewrites AskUserQuestion ↔ vista-AskUserQuestion between CLI and API for the MCP tool handler

name: Tool Filter
slug: Strips dangerous or unwanted tools from the API request before they reach the LLM

name: Model Override
slug: Global model override — rewrites claude-opus-4-7 → claude-opus-4-6. Runs after per-tab overrides (tab settings take priority).

name: Auth Inject
slug: Injects OAuth token from ~/.claude/.credentials.json into requests missing auth headers, allowing --bare with Max/Pro subscriptions

name: Title Schema Shortcut
slug: Short-circuits requests where output_config.format is a json_schema with type 'object', a single required property 'title', and additionalProperties: false. Instead of calling the LLM, returns a dummy response with text '{"title":"Dummy (by vistaclair)"}' and zero token usage. This avoids spending tokens on Claude Code's automatic title-generation requests while keeping claude -p compatibility intact.
